programs.title: Headline News
programs.desc: The latest top stories of the hour.

programs.title: East Asia Tonight
programs.desc: Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programs.title: On The Red Dot
programs.desc: We celebrate Singaporeans making a quiet impact despite challenges. Kelvin Pung, a disabled diver, captures marine life while Azman Hamid, one of Pulau Ubin's last taxi drivers, preserves kampung life.

programs.title: Talking Point
programs.desc: The Strait of Hormuz is shut - and Singaporeans are feeling it at the pump, at the checkout, and at the airport. Steven Chia traces the fuel crisis from the waterway to your wallet.

programs.title: Singapore Tonight
programs.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programs.title: Insight 2026/2027
programs.desc: Business Process Outsourcing is one of the industries most likely to be disrupted by AI. India and Philippines have the world's largest BPO sectors. Will tech threaten the livelihoods of millions?
